calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Ema Bell's unopposed Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted. Based on the record before it, the court finds: (1) the injunctive relief required by the settlement complies with Proposition 65; (2) the penalty amounts are reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2); and, (3) the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law. The consent judgments shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the Parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Prior to the hearing time, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order quoting the text above verbatim.

Prior to the hearing time, Moving Party must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a copy of the proposed consent judgment executed by all relevant parties.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Continued To Apr-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Set For Trial On Nov-03-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
